# Global Sovereign University

> Global Sovereign University (GSU) is a free 501(c)(3) educational nonprofit based in Eugene, Oregon. EIN 39-2716552. Founded by Dr. Gene A. Constant, US Navy and Marine Corps veteran. The full curriculum spans thirteen subjects with no signup, no advertising, no paywall. Powered by GENO, a multilingual AI tutor available in 32 languages, and a library of 175+ original books all donated by the founder. Mission: "Building a Bridge to Freedom Through Education — Not Handouts."

## About the Foundation

- [Mission of the Foundation](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/mission): Pedagogical philosophy, three pillars, and the case for free sovereign education.
- [Three Pillars](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/three-pillars): Sovereign Intelligence, Sovereign Skills, Sovereign Character.
- [The Honest Transcript](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/honest-transcript): A verified record of demonstrated competence, replacing degrees with mentor-signed evidence.
- [Civilization Builders Program](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/civilization-builders): Retired professionals volunteering as mentors to learners worldwide.
- [The Sovereign Handshake](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/sovereign-handshake): The single intake form matching learners and volunteer tutors.

## Subject Hubs (Thirteen Pillars)

- [Readification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/readification): Free reading education built on the Reading Helix framework. Phonemic awareness, phonics, decoding, fluency, vocabulary, comprehension, critical reading, morphology.
- [Mathification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/learning-center): Free math education for K-12 and adults. Addition through algebra, geometry, trade math, financial math.
- [Writingification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/learning-center): Free writing education. Grammar, punctuation, paragraph and essay construction, vocabulary.
- [Civicification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/civicification): Free civics and government education. Constitution, three branches, jury process, bill-making, U.S. history.
- [Financification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/financification): Free financial literacy. Budgeting, banking, debt, investing, taxes, insurance.
- [Tradification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/tradification): Free trade-skills education. Carpentry, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, welding, ironwork, masonry, and more.
- [Digitification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/digitification): Free computer literacy and cybersecurity. Practical digital sovereignty in the AI age.
- [Scientification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/scientification): Free science education. Physics, chemistry, biology, earth and space sciences.
- [Historification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/historification): Free history education. American Revolution, Civil War, westward expansion, civilization choices.
- [Geographication](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/geographication): Free geography. Countries, capitals, landforms, climate, human geography.
- [Thinkification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/thinkification): Free critical thinking. Logical fallacies, cognitive biases, source evaluation, statistical literacy.
- [Lawification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/lawification): Plain-language legal literacy. Constitution, Bill of Rights, contracts, small claims, rights with police.
- [Humanics](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/humanics): People skills. Emotional intelligence, communication, relationships, leadership, empathy.

## Core Platform Components

- [GENO AI Tutor](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/geno): Voice-enabled AI tutor speaking 32 languages. Free, always available, embedded site-wide.
- [The GSU Library](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/library): 50+ free interactive games organized by subject. Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum mastery tiers. Play Before You Buy model.
- [Robot-Proof Hub](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/robot-proof): Capabilities AI cannot easily replicate. Trade skills, intergenerational relationship, civic reasoning, embodied judgment.
- [The Frankenstein Methodology](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/frankenstein-methodology): GSU's seven-axiom learning protocol building AI-proof capability.
- [Synthetix](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/synthetix): The discipline of adaptive sovereignty. Cybernetics, lean manufacturing, and epistemology fused into a single actionable framework.
- [The Wisdom Bridge](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/wisdom-bridge): Where printed books meet digital mastery checkpoints. Read the chapter, prove comprehension.
- [Deep Research Vault](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/deep-research): Graduate-level research on education collapse, cognitive sovereignty, fiscal warfare, and civic capability. 30+ original analyses.
- [Linguification](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/linguification): Free language learning. 2,445 vocabulary words across 10 languages, immersive city scenarios, GENO coaching.
- [Voice of Sovereignty Podcast](https://www.buzzsprout.com/2530740): 160+ episodes in 10 languages. Free education in audio.
- [Brave Sprouts Magazine](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/library): Children's magazine teaching critical thinking from elementary age.

## Featured Books

- [The American Spirit](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/library): Manifesto on American liberty, the Great Law of Peace, and the case for sovereign citizenship.
- [Prove Me Wrong: The Civic Power of Public Debate](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/debate): The Debate Helix framework. Five-layer discipline for honest disagreement, steelmanning, evidence-weighing, and composed exchange.
- [Synthetix](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/synthetix): The intellectual architecture of sovereign capability. Seven axioms, four pillars.
- [The AI Apex](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/ai-apex): The Functional Monster framework for mastering the human-machine frontier.
- [IRREALITY](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/library/irreality): Philosophical inquiry into what remains when the spirit departs. Sartre, Nietzsche, the Bardo Thodol, Jung.

## Optional

- [Quid Pro Quo Donations](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/quid-pro-quo): Donate to GSU and receive printed books from the 194-title library. Tax-deductible 501(c)(3).
- [Small Business Resources](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/small-business): Free education for Main Street. Smart Procurement Playbook, AI literacy, financial literacy.
- [Homeschool Curriculum](https://globalsovereignuniversity.org/homeschool): Complete K-6 homeschool program. Reading, math, writing, science, history, civics, life skills, GENO AI tutor.

## Contact

- Founder: Dr. Gene A. Constant, DBA
- Foundation: The Foundation for Global Instruction (DBA Global Sovereign University)
- Tax ID: EIN 39-2716552 (Oregon 501(c)(3) registered nonprofit)
- Domain: globalsovereignuniversity.org
- Multilingual video calls: free 32-language video translation available via the "Talk in your language" button on every page.
